subject: Captain Ginyu of the Ginyu Force in battle pose, surrounded by purple-tinged electrical energy
description: A purple-skinned, horned humanoid figure strikes a dramatic battle pose at center frame. The figure wears the white-and-orange Ginyu Force battle armor and has the distinctive squat but powerful build of the character. Purple and white electrical energy crackles throughout the surrounding space, filling the frame with kinetic intensity. The background is a deep purple-to-black gradient with bursts of light emanating behind the figure. The card is a double-sided flip card, and the composition emphasizes the character's central authority within a chaotic energy field.
foreground: purple-skinned horned humanoid in battle armor, arms spread in dramatic pose
background: deep purple-black gradient with electrical energy bursts
